Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our Saturday send for paid readers, we round up some of the best. It’s WITI, on the weekend. 
This week, we thought we’d include a few longer reads, while our brains are still relatively rested after the holidays. Happy New Year!
Why are these interesting?
